name: Chicken Tetrazini
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into large pieces and simmer in water until tender (about 1 1/2 to 2 hours). Strain and chill the stock, then remove any fat.
2. Remove the cooked chicken from bones and cut it into 2 x 2 inch pieces. This should yield about four cups of meat.
3. In a saucepan, melt butter and fry celery and onion until transparent. Add flour and seasoning, stirring until well blended. Gradually add stock while stirring constantly until boiling. Cook for 2 minutes.
4. Slowly stir in cream into the sauce.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Break spaghetti into one-inch pieces and cook until al dente. Drain.
6. Sauté mushrooms in butter until browned.
7. Combine sauce with sherry, then layer cooked chicken, mushrooms, and spaghetti in a shallow baking dish coated with butter. Pour the remaining sauce over the top and sprinkle Parmesan cheese on the surface.
8. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until golden brown.
